items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button with glassy variants.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Displays a card with optional glassy variant.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Displays a form input field with optional glassy variant.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Displays a form textarea with optional glassy variant.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge with glassy variant.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: An image element with a fallback for representing the user.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A window overlaid on either the primary window or another dialog window, rendering the content underneath inert.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog that interrupts the user with important content and expects a response.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Visually or semantically separates content with optional glassy variant.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked with optional glassy variant.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked with optional glassy variant.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: A set of layered sections of content—known as tab panels—that are displayed one at a time with optional glassy variant.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A popup that displays information related to an element when the element receives keyboard focus or the mouse hovers over it with optional glassy variant.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Displays rich content in a portal, triggered by a button with optional glassy variant.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Displays a menu to the user — such as a set of actions or functions — triggered by a button with optional glassy variant.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from—triggered by a button with optional glassy variant.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: A set of checkable buttons—known as radio buttons—where no more than one of the buttons can be checked at a time with optional glassy variant.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Use to show a placeholder while content is loading with optional glassy variant.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Displays a callout for user attention with optional glassy variant.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each reveal a section of content.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Displays the path to the current resource using a hierarchy of links.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: A date field component that allows users to enter and edit date.

items.name: chart
items.title: Chart
items.description: Chart components built with Recharts with optional glassy variant.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: An interactive component which expands/collapses a panel.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: Fast, composable, unstyled command menu for React.

items.name: cropper
items.title: Cropper
items.description: An image cropper component with optional glassy variant.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: A drawer component for mobile with optional glassy variant.

items.name: hover-card
items.title: Hover Card
items.description: For sighted users to preview content available behind a link.

items.name: input-otp
items.title: Input OTP
items.description: Accessible one-time password component with copy paste functionality.

items.name: navigation-menu
items.title: Navigation Menu
items.description: A collection of links for navigating websites.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Pagination with page navigation with optional glassy variant.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: Augments native scroll functionality for custom, cross-browser styling.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Extends the Dialog component to display content that complements the main content of the screen.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: A sidebar component with optional glassy variant.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: An input where the user selects a value from within a given range.

items.name: sonner
items.title: Sonner
items.description: An opinionated toast component for React.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: A responsive table with glass variants and optional striped (alternating-brightness) or bordered rows.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: A two-state button that can be either on or off.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group
items.description: A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled on or off.

items.name: mode-toggle
items.title: Mode Toggle
items.description: A theme switcher component with optional glassy variant.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: A loading spinner component with glassy variants.

items.name: button-group
items.title: Button Group
items.description: A group of buttons with glassy variants.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Input Group
items.description: A group of inputs with glassy variants.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty State
items.description: An empty state component with glassy variants.

items.name: menu-bar
items.title: Menu Bar
items.description: A menu bar component with glassy variants.

items.name: date-picker-input
items.title: Date Picker Input
items.description: A date picker input component with glassy variants.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Context Menu
items.description: A context menu component with glassy variants.

items.name: carousel
items.title: Carousel
items.description: A carousel component with glassy variants.

items.name: resizable
items.title: Resizable
items.description: Resizable panel groups and handles with a glassy grip, built on react-resizable-panels.

items.name: dashboard
items.title: Dashboard
items.description: Complete dashboard layout with stats, charts, and navigation.

items.name: authentication
items.title: Authentication
items.description: Login form with glassmorphism effects.

items.name: signup
items.title: Sign Up
items.description: Registration form with validation.

items.name: forgot-password
items.title: Forgot Password
items.description: Password reset form.

items.name: calendar-block
items.title: Calendar
items.description: Calendar view with events and scheduling.

items.name: chart-block
items.title: Chart
items.description: Beautiful charts with bar, line, and area visualizations.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: Sortable, filterable table with pagination on the glass Table.

items.name: theme
items.title: Glass Theme
items.description: The Sistine glass design system: OKLCH color tokens, glass surface variables (frosted, fluted, crystal), the runtime tint system, and animations. Adopt the look without pulling components.

items.name: use-mobile
items.title: use-mobile
items.description: React hook that tracks whether the viewport is below the mobile breakpoint (768px).

items.name: oklch-utils
items.title: OKLCH Utils
items.description: Zero-dependency helpers for parsing, formatting, and manipulating OKLCH colors (hue wrapping, chroma clamping, ramps).

items.name: gradient-utils
items.title: Gradient Utils
items.description: Generate random, aesthetically balanced gradients in the OKLCH color space and render them to CSS.

items.name: theme-generator
items.title: Theme Generator
items.description: Generate light/dark theme CSS (including glass-effect variables) from a set of base colors.

items.name: readable-text
items.title: Readable Text
items.description: APCA contrast guard: renders text in an accent color while it stays readable on the current glass surface, and swaps to a readable foreground otherwise. Reactive to the live glass tint and light/dark.

items.name: glass-utils
items.title: Glass Utils
items.description: Helpers and the GlassCustomization type for per-component glass tuning (color, blur, outline, glow).

items.name: hover-effects
items.title: Hover Effects
items.description: Shared CVA hover-effect variants (glow, shimmer, ripple, lift, scale) for any component.

items.name: canvas-background-utils
items.title: Canvas Background Utils
items.description: Ramp-driven canvas background engine: createCanvas({ color, style, ramp, steps, angle, speed }) renders gradient / lava / circle styles from the OKLCH ramps.

items.name: canvas-background
items.title: Canvas Background
items.description: Full-screen animated canvas background that recolors with the live glass tint — gradient, lava, or circle styles driven by the OKLCH ramps.

items.name: gradient-text
items.title: Gradient Text
items.description: Fills text with a gradient via background-clip. Defaults to the theme's --gradient-text (follows the live glass tint) and falls back to a fixed brand gradient standalone.
